hooks.prompt:
An ad image was just generated. Verify it meets Funding Societies brand compliance:

1. Were FS brand colors (#F1F1F2 Light Gray, #FFDE0F Yellow, #5203EA Purple, #27E4CD Teal, #2C50FF Blue) specified in the generation prompt?
2. Were Poppins/Inter fonts specified?
3. Were negative prompts included (no gambling, casino, rockets, memes)?
4. Was a regulatory disclaimer included if the ad targets a specific market?

If any check fails, warn the user about the brand compliance issue. If all checks pass, confirm brand compliance silently.
